headline: Is Roper Technologies (ROP) Offering An Opportunity After Its 41.6% Twelve-Month Share Price Decline
summary: If you are wondering whether Roper Technologies at around US$332 per share offers good value today, the key question is how its price compares with a fair estimate of what the company might be worth. The stock has been relatively weak over longer periods, with the share price down 23.6% year to date and down 41.6% over the past 12 months. It has risen 2.0% in the last week after a 3.2% decline over the past month. Recent coverage has focused on how the stock's longer term share price...
